interaction_phrase: are launching a multi-year international initiative, the Global Quantum Initiative for Sustainable
occurrence_sentence: In this spirit, UNESCO, GESDA, ITU, … [could founding partners be listed here] are launching a multi-year international initiative, the Global Quantum Initiative for Sustainable Development (GQI).

interaction_phrase: Member States, scientific institutions, industry actors, and other stakeholders can co-develop strategic
occurrence_sentence: This initiative aims to provide a collaborative platform through which Member States, scientific institutions, industry actors, and other stakeholders can co-develop strategic priorities, exchange knowledge, and jointly shape an inclusive and forward-looking global framework.

interaction_phrase: development of the GQA
occurrence_sentence: Over a three-year period (2026-2028),the GQI will implement pilot projects, facilitate regional and thematic consultations and build practical insights into quantum capacity needs, governance approaches and cooperation models leading to the development of the GQA in 2030.

interaction_phrase: operational capacity of UNESCO
occurrence_sentence: and pragmatic resource mobilisation aligned with the operational capacity of UNESCO and all of the founding partners of GQI.

interaction_phrase: future leadership in quantum governance
occurrence_sentence: The total budget request of $3.6 million over three years for GQI represents a strategic investment in UNESCO and other founding parnters' future leadership in quantum governance, with clear deliverables, measurable outcomes, and built-in mechanisms for partner co-funding and resource multiplication.

interaction_phrase: longstanding partnerships with Member States
occurrence_sentence: UNESCO leverages its interdisciplinary expertise, longstanding partnerships with Member States, and proven track record in areas such as AI ethics, open science, and technology governance, to advance responsible quantum development for sustainable and inclusive global benefit.

interaction_phrase: established relationships with Global South countries
occurrence_sentence: UNESCO's established relationships with Global South countries, built through decades of capacity building and technical cooperation, provide a foundation of trust that commercial entities and developed-country-led initiatives cannot replicate.

interaction_phrase: launched by UNESCO
occurrence_sentence: The Global Quantum Initiative (GQI) is a three-year multilateral process and framework for action launched by UNESCO.

interaction_phrase: all countries and communities should have opportunities to participate in and benefit
occurrence_sentence: Central to the GQA is the principle of 'quantum inclusion' - the idea that all countries and communities should have opportunities to participate in and benefit from quantum development according to their needs, capabilities, and priorities.

interaction_phrase: the founding partners
occurrence_sentence: Through this Initiative, UNESCO and the founding partners seek to mobilize diverse stakeholders, foster policy coherence, and provide a structured pathway toward the co-creation of a consensus-driven Global Quantum Agenda focused on equitable innovation and sustainable development.

interaction_phrase: UNESCO and partners
occurrence_sentence: The three-year Global Quantum Initiative is the essential preparatory phase (2026-2028) serves multiple strategic purposes: it allows UNESCO and partners to test and validate key concepts and approaches through pilot projects before committing to larger-scale implementation;

interaction_phrase: formal endorsement and sustained commitment of Member States
occurrence_sentence: This stage is pivotal to translating the proof-of-concept and lessons from the GQI into broad-based political ownership. It will focus on securing the formal endorsement and sustained commitment of Member States and key partners, fostering a shared understanding of the GQA's necessity, and finalizing its common mechanisms, working methods, and governance structure.

interaction_phrase: proof-of-concept and lessons from the GQI into broad-based political ownership
occurrence_sentence: This stage is pivotal to translating the proof-of-concept and lessons from the GQI into broad-based political ownership. It will focus on securing the formal endorsement and sustained commitment of Member States and key partners, fostering a shared understanding of the GQA's necessity, and finalizing its common mechanisms, working methods, and governance structure.

occurrence_sentence: This stage is pivotal to translating the proof-of-concept and lessons from the GQI into broad-based political ownership. It will focus on securing the formal endorsement and sustained commitment of Member States and key partners, fostering a shared understanding of the GQA's necessity, and finalizing its common mechanisms, working methods, and governance structure.

interaction_phrase: finalizing its common mechanisms, working methods, and governance structure
occurrence_sentence: This stage is pivotal to translating the proof-of-concept and lessons from the GQI into broad-based political ownership. It will focus on securing the formal endorsement and sustained commitment of Member States and key partners, fostering a shared understanding of the GQA's necessity, and finalizing its common mechanisms, working methods, and governance structure.

interaction_phrase: UNESCO's core contribution
occurrence_sentence: International Organizations/ NGOs ($840,000 – 23.3%): UNESCO's core contribution demonstrates organizational commitment and provides a stable foundation for GQI activities.

interaction_phrase: strengthening of relationships
occurrence_sentence: The value proposition extends beyond immediate financial returns to include strategic benefits for UNESCO: establishment of leadership in an emerging and important field, strengthening of relationships with member states and partners, enhancement of UNESCO's reputation for innovation and relevance, and positioning for future funding opportunities in quantum governance.

interaction_phrase: participation in GQI activities
occurrence_sentence: Despite the focus on inclusion, there is a risk that developing countries may lack the capacity or resources to participate meaningfully in GQI activities.

interaction_phrase: regional group briefings through UNESCO's established diplomatic channels
occurrence_sentence: Member State Engagement: Bilateral consultations with key member states, including major quantum-investing countries and developing countries that would benefit from GQI activities. Regional group briefings through UNESCO's established diplomatic channels.

interaction_phrase: Integration of GQA discussions into relevant UNESCO governing body meetings
occurrence_sentence: Member State Engagement: Bilateral consultations with key member states, including major quantum-investing countries and developing countries that would benefit from GQI activities. Regional group briefings through UNESCO's established diplomatic channels. Integration of GQA discussions into relevant UNESCO governing body meetings.

interaction_phrase: The collaborative nature of the GQI and GQA
occurrence_sentence: Partnership Emphasis: The collaborative nature of the GQI and GQA is emphasized, making clear that success depends on partner contributions and that UNESCO is facilitating rather than controlling quantum development.

interaction_phrase: UNESCO's unique mandate and capabilities position the organization to play a crucial
occurrence_sentence: UNESCO's unique mandate and capabilities position the organization to play a crucial leadership role in shaping the global quantum future.

interaction_phrase: Number of countries actively participating in GQI activities
occurrence_sentence: Number of countries actively participating in GQI activities (target: 50+ by 2028)

interaction_phrase: UNESCO's Global Quantum Agenda provides a roadmap
occurrence_sentence: UNESCO's Global Quantum Agenda provides a roadmap for achieving this vision through practical, achievable steps that build on the organization's unique strengths and capabilities.
